title: Are AI labs pelicanmaxxing?
summary: 这篇文章探讨了AI实验室是否在过度追求“鹈鹕最大化”（pelicanmaxxing），即优先开发更大、更昂贵的模型而非高效实用的AI系统。作者分析了当前AI研究趋势，指出实验室可能因竞争压力而忽视成本效益和可访问性，并呼吁平衡创新与可持续性。
summary_en: This article explores whether AI labs are 'pelicanmaxxing'—prioritizing larger, more expensive models over efficient and practical AI systems. The author analyzes current AI research trends, suggesting labs may overlook cost-effectiveness and accessibility due to competitive pressure, and calls for a balance between innovation and sustainability.
